creator: rehak@tekkirk.org
text: After upgrade to FreeBSD 12.0 I have found that there is no opensmtpd package at all. Port 5.9.2p1 still exists, but can't be built. Is there ANY workaround or a way how to build/install whichever version, please? Otherwise this issue seems as a show stopper for people who would like to upgrade to 12.
